name: Climate.Haier → Set Vertical Airflow
description: (supported only by hOn) Set direction for vertical airflow if the vertical swing is disabled.

config_entries.label: Vertical Airflow
config_entries.description: The vertical airflow direction. Possible values: `Health_Up`, `Max_Up`, `Up`, `Center`, `Down`, `Health_Down`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the Haier climate component.
